info.title: trwdog
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trwdog
## Summary
Kill a program that runs too long
## Description
Execute a command with a watchdog timer.
## Usage
trwdog <arg>+
## Examples
trwdog make test
## Current version
0.23.42 Fixes to trgen templates.
